decisions.briefing: Markets pulled back mildly today with NASDAQ -0.5% and S&P 500 -0.2%, a classic neutral session at the open of Q3. Strategy memory is explicit: do not deploy cash on neutral days just to fill slots. With $577 available and 4 open positions, the right call is to hold dry powder and wait for a genuine risk-on day — ideally NASDAQ up 2% or more — before pulling the trigger on the top-scored candidates like FIG, TALO, ALSN, or NKE. Existing positions continue to run; no stop-loss or profit-target levels were breached today.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities opened Q3 2026 on a cautious note, with the S&P 500 slipping -0.2% and the Nasdaq dipping -0.5% as investors rotated defensively after a strong June. Quarter-end portfolio rebalancing — institutional funds trimming equity exposure to lock in H1 gains — is a recurring pattern on the first trading day of a new quarter. With no major macro catalyst today, the mild selling reflects profit-taking and positioning caution rather than a fundamental shift in trend.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股在2026年第三季首個交易日以謹慎姿態開局，標普500指數下跌0.2%，納斯達克跌0.5%，市場資金在強勢六月後轉向防守。季末再平衡效應明顯——機構基金普遍削減股票倉位，鎖定上半年收益，此乃新季初常見現象。由於今日缺乏重大宏觀催化劑，小幅調整反映的是獲利回吐與倉位觀望，而非市場趨勢的根本轉變。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: At the end of every quarter, large institutional investors like pension funds and mutual funds rebalance their portfolios — selling assets that have grown too large and buying those that have shrunk. This mechanical selling often causes mild dips on the first day of a new quarter even when the underlying economy is fine. Recognizing this pattern helps you avoid mistaking routine rebalancing for a genuine market downturn.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 每個季末，退休基金、共同基金等大型機構投資者會進行投資組合再平衡——賣出比重過高的資產，補入比重不足的部分。這種機械性的賣盤往往在新季首日造成溫和回落，即使基本面並無異狀。識別此規律，有助於避免將例行再平衡誤判為真正的市場下跌訊號。
